meaning: vt.使生气的,使活泼,使生动
examples: He sidetracked to enliven the atmosphere.
These sassy shoes will enliven little black dresses.
Perhaps they need the drama to enliven the sterile atmosphere of the boardroom.
Doddsy was an impact sub, there was no-one better to come off the bench and enliven things.
These light modules enliven under cabinet lighting, under counter edges or the toe kicks on kitchen islands.
